Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_FIRST_TRY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4008 0 0}The entrance to the labyrinth is at the top of the stairs. Whenever you feel ready to start, lead the way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_ENT_HELP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10089 0 0}As we explore Tartarus, this will be our temporary base of operations.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10090 0 0}I'm counting on you to take charge during the operation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_HELP_WARNING
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10091 0 0}It looks like it's been a while since we've come here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10092 0 0}It's important we sharpen our combat abilities here so we're prepared for sudden Shadow attacks like the one earlier.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10093 0 0}It never hurts to train beforehand. Try to keep that in mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_2ndWARNING
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10094 0 0}I'll briefly go over Tartarus once more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_THEURGIA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 21001 0 0}Ooh, {f 4 1}-kun, that new sword looks pretty cool.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 21002 0 0}This bow I got is really light and looks pretty easy to use. I can't wait to see it in action![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_THEURGIA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 21003 0 0}So the chairman got us all new weapons too, huh? Guess we should be thanking him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_THEURGIA_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 21004 0 0}He barely explained anything though. Sometimes I can't tell if he's actually helpful or not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_THEURGIA_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 21005 0 0}All of this has been custom-made for us. You can tell because of the SEES mark engraved on everything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 21006 0 0}As always, you're in command, {f 4 1}. And make sure to check the equipment before we get started.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_GREET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4115 0 0}Now that we have Yamagishi, I'll be available for the front lines as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, I think we should continue sending out four people at most on excursions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}That would make for a most cohesive team, and having reserve members for unexpected situations is definitely wise.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Regarding the actual party members included, I'll leave that to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Once you've formed a party with the members here, you can move out when you feel ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_GREET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}I'll do my best to help you all. Hope it goes well![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_GREET_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}Um, I don't exactly know what I'm doing, but I'll try my best![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_WARP_NOTICE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10106 0 0}Those devices are teleporters—they're portals that are all connected to one another.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10107 0 0}Once activated, you should be able to travel between any of the other devices.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10108 0 0}Be sure to activate any you come across. They'll be quite useful during future expeditions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_WARP_NOTICE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5018 0 0}Welcome back! It really is just as I had thought...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Those devices are teleporters—they're portals that are all connected to one another.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Once activated, you should be able to travel between any of the other devices.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please activate any that you come across. They'll be very useful during future expeditions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_MONAD_TUTO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}About that door—it appears to lead to a side path in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}In short, taking that path would be a detour of sorts from our usual route aiming for the top.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, it seems like you'll be able to obtain something down that path that should prove helpful to exploring...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Depending on how prepared you are, it may be a good idea to try these doors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_FIND_PERSON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Welcome back! So, it looks like you were able to rescue a missing person...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}We can have them stay here for now. We'll see them off properly when the time comes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_FIND_CAT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5018 0 0}Welcome back! I'm so relieved you were able to save that kitty![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}It can stay here for now. We'll send it off safely when the time comes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_CAT_INFO_SIN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Tartarus appears to have a special little guest today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}And between its jaws, it clenches a fragment that emits a curious, blue light.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Should your curiosity get the best of you, perhaps it'd be best to pay this guest a visit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I believe it will likely be on floor {f 2 4 0}. Well, off you go...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_CAT_INFO_DOU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Tartarus appears to have some special little guests today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}What a rare treat for you... Should your curiosity get the best of you, it may be best to pay these guests a visit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Perhaps more of those mysterious, glowing fragments are in your future![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I believe they will likely be on floors {f 2 4 0} and {f 2 4 1}. Well, off you go...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_INFO_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Currently, you appear to possess a great number of Personas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Quite impressive, I must say. However...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Perhaps in your current state, you are able to utilize even more powerful Personas?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Should you feel so inclined, please make your way to the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_MITSURU_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4017 0 0}Ah, you're back. Good—everyone's safety is more important than anything else.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have the items that our other squadmates found during their recon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Allow me to hand them over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_MITSURU_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4075 0 0}So, the timing for when you return is up to you, our leader, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}It's poor form to leave your comrades behind. You owe them a proper apology later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5018 0 0}Welcome back! I'm glad everyone returned safely.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}I have the items that the others found while they were scouting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Here, you should hold on to them, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5077 0 0}Um, and just so you know, you shouldn't come back without saying anything when someone is scouting ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 -1 0 0}It would be terrible if they felt like you were abandoning them, so... Just be a little more considerate, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SEPARATELY_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ah, if you're returning to exploring, before I forget...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Let me hand over what the others found while they were out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_PRIESTESS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The High Priestess Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_HERMIT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Hermit Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_HANGEDMAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Hanged Man Major Arcana card[n]has been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_EMPRESS_EM
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Empress and Emperor Major Arcana[n]cards have been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_HIERO_LOVE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Hierophant and Lovers Major Arcana[n]cards have been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_CHARI_JUST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Chariot and Justice Major Arcana[n]cards have been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_CARD_INFO_FORT_STREN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Fortune and Strength Major Arcana[n]cards have been added to Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ArcanaInfo01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13202 0 0}I've been waiting for you. May I have but a moment of your time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_ArcanaInfo02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Lovers card is glowing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ArcanaInfo
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Upon acquiring the Lovers, the Social Link bonus during fusion increases.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_TutoAfter_TheurgiaGa
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Theurgy Gauge{f 0 1 27} has been added to Tutorials.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_TutoAfter_PartyMembe
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Changing the Party{f 0 1 27} has been added to Tutorials.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MISSING_NPC_NOT_EXIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5113 0 0}I tried another search, but I'm still not picking up anyone else's presence inside.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}It seems we've rescued everybody who accidently ended up in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_CLOCK_FLOOR_AFTER01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}For a second, I lost you all... But then it was like you just teleported here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}What an odd place... What do you think could be the deal with that clock?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_CLOCK_FLOOR_AFTER02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}If it seems like it'll be helpful, it'd be smart of us to make use of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It doesn't seem dangerous... Maybe it actually has a positive effect on everyone?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}If the entrance opens up again, let's try it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5018 0 0}Welcome back! How'd you enjoy the clock this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm actually feeling pretty good right now. If it's all right with you, I'd like to join you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I feel like I've got tons of energy right now! Wanna put me in the party?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}I've got a really good mental image of how I should be moving. Let me join you and you won't regret it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, I actually feel similarly myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I have a feeling that I'll do especially well in there right now. Could you please include me in your party?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, this may be sudden, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}This applies to myself as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I am unusually energized. Please include me on the front lines.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}Aigis-san, I'd like to ask...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}Could you put me on the front lines? I feel like I can become a lot stronger right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry to butt in, but... same.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Could you include me? I mean, I'm feelin' pretty good right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 -1 -1 0 0}You can bring me along! I feel like I could take on anything right now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_7_0_H
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have a feeling that my power is going to amplify. Could you include me in the front line?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KORO_THEURGIA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}Ah, that's right—there's something I wanted to tell you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KORO_THEURGIA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It seems Koro-chan actually has two Theurgies![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The chairman learned that from researching his potential.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're not totally sure why that's the case, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's certainly nice to have him on our side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_KORO_THEURGIA_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}I suppose just keep that in mind whenever forming a party. That's all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Tuto_MissingNPC_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Elizabeth mentioned someone[n]wandering into Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_101_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13202 0 0}Pardon me. Could I have a moment of your time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_102_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13202 0 0}Could you spare a moment of your time? My master wishes to speak with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13202 0 0}Pardon me. Could I have a moment of your time?[n]{f 1 1}
